title: Mons, Hainaut — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mons, Hainaut: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mons is a city in Hainaut with a population of 95,000. A historic university city with a UNESCO-listed belfry, a vibrant cultural scene, and the impressive Mons Memorial Museum.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
